batch_metadata.timezone_note: Entirely EST (UTC-5). DST already changed Nov 3, 2024; DST spring forward Mar 9, 2025 is ahead. RF-02 B-021 date range states start Dec 18, 2024 but actual first message is ROW-7706 on Dec 19 (no Dec 18 messages exist). RF-02 reports 482 messages — this reflects anomalous row-numbering convention from B-007+ (MMS rows intermixed); actual SMS count is 8.
batch_metadata.note: Phase A/B boundary. B-021 marks entry into Phase B of the record (post-Oct 2024 behavioral silence, triage inflection INF-005). The Oct 2024 silence was confirmed as Melissa withdrawing after intense early-October conflict (not court-ordered). B-021 represents the beginning of the sparse communication period observed after INF-005.

ARC-RF01-001.notes: B-021 produces no RF-01 signals. Extremely sparse period: 8 messages, all routine (childcare coordination, holiday, pickup inquiry). The Jan 2025 triage hot-period escalation has not yet materialized as of Jan 8.

batch_observations.tone_assessment: Minimal communication period — 8 messages over 21 days. ROW-7706-7709 (Dec 19): childcare coordination — Melissa initially needs Eli to watch Olivia Monday but then resolves it ('Actually never mind. Ha said she would watch her'). ROW-7710 (Dec 23): $25 payment request. ROW-7711 (Dec 25): 'Meta quest is cool as hell' — casual holiday message, Olivia presumably received Meta Quest as gift. ROW-7712 (Jan 7): 'They had a Dr appointment and she was still able to watch Olivia. She is the best help ever' — childcare update. ROW-7713 (Jan 8): 'Are you picking her up tonight or not?' — routine pickup inquiry.
batch_observations.phase_transition: The sparse communication density (8 messages in 21 days) is consistent with the INF-005 behavioral silence period noted in the pipeline manifest ('Melissa withdrew after intense early-October conflict'). The triage identified Oct 2024 as an inflection point. B-021 falls within the subsequent quiet period. The Jan 2025 'hot period' triage escalation signal begins in B-022+.
batch_observations.holiday_period: Christmas 2024 covered by 1 message (ROW-7711 Dec 25). No conflict around holiday scheduling in the record. Meta Quest gift suggests Olivia is with someone during Christmas — context: with Eli and Abby, or with Melissa?
